metaDescription: Cadaver workshops, hands-on training and CME programs for Indian orthopaedic and spine surgeons. Avana partners with leading hospitals to advance Full Endoscopic Spine Surgery education.

hero.title: Fostering expertise and skill — Avana's pledge to medical professionals' growth.
hero.description: Education is a lifelong journey. Avana's medical education programmes give surgeons the latest techniques in Full Endoscopic Spine Surgery, hands-on cadaver and bone model practice, and a network of colleagues across India. Find the workshop that's right for you below.
hero.imageAlt: Avana training programme — surgeon hands-on workshop

conditionsHeading.title: Training designed around your practice
conditionsHeading.lead: From hands-on surgical workshops and cadaver labs to symposia and CME lectures — we run programmes at every stage of a surgeon's career, with an emphasis on Full Endoscopic Spine Surgery and minimally invasive techniques.

conditions.title: Cadaver Workshops
conditions.description: Multi-station cadaver labs at AIIMS, MS Ramaiah, Symbiosis and other leading centres. Practise techniques on tissue under faculty guidance.

conditions.title: Bone Model Training
conditions.description: Hands-on bone model stations with camera systems — ideal for residents, fellows, and early-career spine surgeons building procedure confidence.

conditions.title: Live Surgery Demonstrations
conditions.description: Observe full-endoscopic spine procedures performed live by senior faculty, with intra-operative commentary and case discussion.

conditions.title: Webinars & KOL Series
conditions.description: Online lectures from key opinion leaders — "KOL to Young Surgeon" series and patient-education webinars. Free to register, accessible across India.

testimonials.name: Dr. (anonymised)
testimonials.testimonial: The combination of hands-on cadaver time with senior-faculty mentorship is something I haven't found in many other Indian programmes. The Avana team handles logistics end-to-end so we just turn up and learn.

testimonials.name: Dr. (anonymised)
testimonials.testimonial: Excellent setup — multiple stations with camera systems, structured progression through cases. My residents took away meaningful confidence after just two days.

faq.question: Who can attend Avana training programmes?
faq.answer: Our programmes are designed for practising orthopaedic surgeons, spine surgeons, neurosurgeons, and senior residents/fellows. Cadaver workshops typically have a minimum experience level set by the host faculty — check the specific event listing.

faq.question: Is there a fee to attend?
faq.answer: We have both free and paid training programs, check the program page for more details. Conference-hosted programmes (ASSICON, KOACON, GESS, etc.) follow the host society's registration model — contact us and we'll connect you to the right organiser.

faq.question: How do I register for an upcoming programme?
faq.answer: Click "Register / Enquire" on any upcoming programme card below, or email info@avanasurgical.com with your name, hospital, and the programme you're interested in. Our team will confirm a slot and share venue details.

faq.question: Can our hospital host an Avana training session?
faq.answer: Yes — we partner with medical colleges and hospitals across India to host bone-model and cadaver workshops. We bring the systems, faculty support, and equipment; you provide the venue and the resident cohort. Email us to discuss.

faq.question: Do you offer Continuing Medical Education (CME) credits?
faq.answer: Some Avana programmes are CME-accredited via the host institution or society. Where applicable, the specific event listing will note the credit hours. Webinars are typically informational; in-person conference sessions often carry credits.

faq.question: What's the focus of your Full Endoscopic Spine Surgery training?
faq.answer: Avana's flagship programmes cover the full curriculum: anatomy and approach, decompression techniques, fusion, and post-op management. We use RiwoSpine systems and follow the protocols of leading international centres, adapted for the Indian operating environment.

faq.question: Can I observe a live surgery?
faq.answer: Several of our programmes include live-surgery viewing days at the host hospital. These have limited slots — register early. Online streamed live surgeries are also part of the KOL-to-Young-Surgeon webinar series.

cta.title: Don't wait — register for the next programme.
cta.description: Avana's training calendar covers cadaver labs, bone model workshops, live surgeries, conferences and online webinars across India. Whatever stage of your career, there's a course for you.
cta.disclaimer: Avana partners with leading hospitals and medical societies across India to deliver Full Endoscopic Spine Surgery education and orthopaedic training.
